\tzpentry{ID3462}{Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3462 introduces Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \theta_i(t) = \omega_i^{(rot)} t + \Omega_i(\text{tidal}) + \phi_i \]
